content.text: mira's comfort object for naps (and travel) is her **blue elephant** — that's what you've noted works for her in those contexts, so keeping it part of the nap wind-down routine is the move. if she had a short nap recently and was cranky by evening, having the blue elephant ready and consistent can help signal "sleep time" to her brain, which at 36 months is very responsive to predictable cues. if you're ever away from home and forgot it, a quick video call showing her the elephant or a photo can sometimes bridge the gap until you have it in hand.
